title: Luffy Enters Queen’s Deadly Prison Game
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Beast Pirates, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Hyogoro, Unknown person #8 as The Flower Capital erupts around Orochi and Komurasaki while Luffy is forced into Queen’s brutal prison games.
scene: Queen turns Udon into a spectacle while Luffy and Hyogoro are forced to survive a deadly punishment game.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Anyway, all you must do is continue to win the Sumo matches!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Because if you get pushed out of the ring, you will die instantly!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The two of you will fight as a pair!! Once you've both been pushed out, the execution will be complete.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...However, straw hat... If you decide at any time that you would like to join our pirate crew, you alone will be spared!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: On our side, we have the advantage of weapons, numbers, and we won't be wearing collars!! Also, we can have as many men in the ring at one time as we want!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: But I'll throw you a bone!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can fight without those seasons hand- cuffs on! ♂

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Whaaaaat!? But I put in a lot of work to get the key....!!

dialogue.speaker: Beast Pirates
dialogue.text: They're really Remov- ing his cuffs!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hm? Does that mean this key isn't the one to luffy- Dono's cuffs!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: It's off!! Hey, you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You're actually a good guy!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We've pretty much escaped already!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Did you forget about the collar!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Instead of thinking like you got something taken off, think of it as having something much worse around your neck now. That makes sense to you, right!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait just a moment, please!! If we fight as a pair, I'll just be in straw hat's way!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Please at least allow us to fight one at a time....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, balloon guy!! If I send you flying...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Balloon!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Will you let us escape?!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not only is he rude, but he also didn't listen to a thing we said!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Master Queen, it'll be easier if we just show him!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and doesn't understand that it puts his chance of survival at ZERO!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're right!! Okay. Prepare your- selves and get in the ring, boys!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Whoa, there's a lot of 'em!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: DEATH MATCH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Do it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Wait- ERS!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Death match!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hahaha!! On top of that, they've even got weapons.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Do you under- stand...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The fact that you're about to die!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: DEATH MATCH!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Face OFF!! Face OFF!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Anyone remember

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Ready... set...!!

dialogue.speaker: Hyogoro
dialogue.text: Rest in peace... Grandpa Hyogorou... straw hat...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: GOOO OOO!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: URYAA AHHH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Beast Pirates
dialogue.text: Watch closely, prisoners!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: THIS IS WHAT WILL HAPPEN IF YOU DARE TO DEFY A GUARD...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Gya Haha Haha...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: UWAA AAA!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: KyaA AAM!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Who's Next!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Remember whether

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: These guys don't even count as a warmup.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: WHATA...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: www.aama.com/amat?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The color of the conqueror.... how unex- pected...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Muha haha!!...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's been noisy ever since he got here...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I'm count- ing on you, Luffytaro.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: KAPA PAA!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Prison and Capital Crisis storyline with 54 dialogue beats. Orochi’s paranoia and Queen’s prison game raise the stakes on both sides of Wano.
